name: synapse-memory
description: Local-first Synapse AI Memory automation for Claude/Codex conversations, MemoryInbox review, and explicit long-term memory reflection.

interface.shortDescription: Safe local memory pipeline for Claude/Codex conversations.
interface.longDescription: Synapse Memory captures Claude and Codex conversations into a local-only private store, extracts guarded memory candidates, appends them to an Obsidian MemoryInbox, and reflects approved candidates into long-term memory only when explicitly requested.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap Synapse Memory on this Mac without enabling LaunchAgents.
Run a Synapse Memory e2e dry-run and summarize the result.
Review pending MemoryInbox candidates and show what would be reflected.
